SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.valve

Class InadvertentValveOperationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.valve.InadvertentValveOperationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class InadvertentValveOperationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of an InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer analysis.

Captures the diagnosed inadvertent valve operation (IVO) scenario per API 521 §4.4.13 and NORSOK P-002: the assumed valve role, the failure mode considered, the consequence severity and the initiating-event frequency used to drive downstream LOPA / SIL studies.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

      Returns:

      Parameters:
      p - downstream pressure in bara

    • getDesignPressureBara

      public double getDesignPressureBara()
      Returns:
      design pressure (MAWP) of the protected segment in bara

    • setDesignPressureBara

      public void setDesignPressureBara(double p)
      Parameters:
      p - design pressure (MAWP) in bara

    • getOverpressureFactor

      public double getOverpressureFactor()
      Returns:
      ratio of credible peak pressure to design pressure (1.0 = at MAWP)

    • setOverpressureFactor

      public void setOverpressureFactor(double f)
      Parameters:
      f - overpressure factor

    • isBlockedOutlet

      public boolean isBlockedOutlet()
      Returns:
      true if the IVO leaves the protected segment with no flow outlet

    • setBlockedOutlet

      public void setBlockedOutlet(boolean b)
      Parameters:
      b - blocked-outlet flag

    • isReverseFlowRisk

      public boolean isReverseFlowRisk()
      Returns:
      true if the IVO can drive reverse flow into the upstream segment

    • setReverseFlowRisk

      public void setReverseFlowRisk(boolean b)
      Parameters:
      b - reverse-flow risk flag

    • isLossOfReliefPath

      public boolean isLossOfReliefPath()
      Returns:
      true if the IVO disables a relief path (e.g. PSV isolation valve closed)

    • setLossOfReliefPath

      public void setLossOfReliefPath(boolean b)
      Parameters:
      b - loss-of-relief-path flag

    • isFailureToIsolateOnDemand

      public boolean isFailureToIsolateOnDemand()
      Returns:
      true if the IVO defeats a required isolation function on demand

    • setFailureToIsolateOnDemand

      public void setFailureToIsolateOnDemand(boolean b)
      Parameters:
      b - failure-to-isolate-on-demand flag

      d - scenario description
